name: list_courses
description: Retrieve courses from the Moodle site. You can get all site courses or filter to courses a specific user is enrolled in. Returns course names, IDs, categories, summaries, and enrollment counts.

parameters.name: wsfunction
parameters.description: The API function name. Use 'core_course_get_courses' for all courses or 'core_enrol_get_users_courses' for a user's courses.

parameters.name: userid
parameters.description: The user ID to get enrolled courses for (required for core_enrol_get_users_courses).

body.summary: An introductory course covering programming fundamentals.
